Who We Are

More Than a Print Shop

Chosen Media (U) Ltd is Uganda's dedicated book printing partner — built for institutions, educators, and authors who refuse to compromise on quality.

We combine precision printing technology with deep understanding of the Ugandan education market. Whether you need a P.6 Social Studies textbook or an A-Level ICT Handbook, we deliver materials that inspire students and stand up to daily classroom use.

Every project is handled with care — from cover design consultation to binding and delivery. Our team at Karobwa Tower, Nkrumah Road, is ready to turn your manuscript into a finished, professional publication.

Our Portfolio
What We Do

Print Services

From a single title to bulk institutional orders — every print run with uncompromising standard.

01
📚

Textbook Printing

Curriculum-aligned school and university textbooks, workbooks, and pupil's books printed to ministry standards with durable binding.

02
📖

Novels & Story Books

Fiction and non-fiction titles, memoirs, and local literature — beautifully typeset and finished for commercial sale or institutional use.

03
📋

Revision Guides

Integrated revision materials, past paper booklets, and exam preparation guides for primary and secondary students across Uganda.

04
💻

Technical Handbooks

A-Level ICT, science, and professional technical manuals with diagrams, charts, and full-color illustration printing.

05
⛪

Church & NGO Publications

Devotionals, hymnals, programme booklets, annual reports, and organizational literature for faith and civil society bodies.

06
🎓

University Publications

Journals, dissertations, departmental magazines, and research publications for Uganda's higher education institutions.

High Quality.
Affordable Prices.

Every book we print is a promise kept — to the author, to the educator, to the student who holds it.

We Serve

Built for Institutions

Whether you represent a rural primary school or a national NGO, our affordable pricing and consistent quality make us the right partner.

How It Works

From Manuscript to Shelf

1

Consultation

Share your manuscript, quantity, and budget. We guide you on format, paper, and binding options.

2

Design & Proof

Our team prepares a print-ready proof for your approval — cover, layout, and interior pages.

3

Production

Full print run with quality control at every stage — color accuracy, binding strength, and finish.

4

Delivery

Packaged and delivered or collected from our Nkrumah Road offices in Kampala.
